description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a single-edged steel blade. The handle is made from a medium-brown wood, showing a natural grain and a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The blade is wedge-shaped, with a broad cutting edge and a flat poll opposite the edge, suitable for both chopping and splitting tasks. The blade is mounted securely onto the handle using a traditional wedged fitting, with the head sitting flush against the wood. The metal of the blade is matte black, contrasting with the lighter wood of the handle. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the blade or the handle.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a matte black steel blade, designed for chopping and splitting. The blade is securely wedged onto the handle, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, matte black blade with a flat poll.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the handle and the thickness of the blade's mounting.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the blade's single cutting edge from the other side.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the alignment of the blade with the handle and the wedge mounting style.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an oval cross-section, ergonomic grip, and natural wood grain.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a broad cutting edge, flat poll, and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting with the blade head seated flush against the handle.
